title: Bare Bones x Simple Copper Pipes
description: Bare Bones textures for Simple Copper Pipes mod !
body:
![Bare Bones x Simple Copper Pipes logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b93df59234896a3142c4cddce512e2f41f2b936.png)
-----------

This resource pack adds Bare Bones textures to [Simple Copper Pipes](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-copper-pipes) mod !

- I highly recommend using [Bare Bones x Mods](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-mods) instead of this pack - It's a more convenient way to use my Bare Bones compatibility packs !
